title: carex × oenensis
intro: Carex × oenensis, also known as Oenotherm sedge, is a hybrid plant species of sedges that belongs to the Carex family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex × oenensis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations and infections.
